title: Checkpoint Files, Atomic Replacement, Versioning, and Resume · Go Semantics Case: Atomic Replace
summary: State is gob-encoded in place, partial writes look valid, policies drift, in-flight work becomes complete, and resuming can contact sites before review. Predict owner authority, URL and HTTP state, Go ownership, bounded work, accessibility impact, failure, cleanup, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the crawler go atomic replace increment in crash-consistent policy-bound checkpoint. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-ca…
objectives: Write temporary state, flush and sync under declared durability, validate, rename atomically, sync directory where required, and retain fallback.
